zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Howard於1341年出生在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得時，她的父親John Howard32歲，母親Alice de Bois32歲。她於1366年10月之前與Sir Robert Pashley de Passele在英國諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1397年在英國素可費艾利特享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Howard于1341年出生在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得时，她的父亲John Howard32岁，母亲Alice de Bois32岁。她于1366年10月之前与Sir Robert Pashley de Passele在英国諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1397年在英国素可費艾利特享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Howard was born in 1341, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, her father, John Howard, was 32 and her mother, Alice de Bois, was 32. She married Sir Robert Pashley de Passele before October 1366, in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1397, in Fairlight, Sussex, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Howard est née en 1341, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Howard, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bois, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Pashley de Passele avant octobre 1366, à Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Fairlight, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Howard 1341 in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howard 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de Bois 32. Sie hat vor Oktober 1366 in Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England Sir Robert Pashley de Passele geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1397 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Fairlight, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Howard è nata il nel 1341 nel Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England, sua padre, John Howard, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice de Bois, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Pashley de Passele prima del ottobre 1366, nel Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1397, nel Fairlight, Sussex, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Howardが1341年にイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペターで生まれた時，父John Howardは32歳，母Alice de Boisは32歳であった。1366年10月以前にイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト ペターでSir Robert Pashley de Passeleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1397年にイギリススセックスファイルリトで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Howard(이)가 1341년 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howard(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Bois(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1366년 10월 이전 영국 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 피터에서 Sir Robert Pashley de Passele(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 수세스 파어라이트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Howard nasceu em 1341, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Howard, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bois, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Pashley de Passele antes outubro de 1366, em Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1397, em Fairlight, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Howard родилась в 1341 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Howard было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bois, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Pashley de Passele перед октябрь 1366 г. в местности вигенолл ст питир, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1397 г. в местности феирлаит, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Howard nació en 1341, en Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Howard, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice de Bois, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Pashley de Passele antes de octubre de 1366, en Wiggenhall St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1397, en Fairlight, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
